title: Carlube 2-Stroke Mineral Motorcycle Oil, CarPlan 5L Fuel Can, Unleaded Petrol (Green) + CarPlan 2-Stroke Fuel Mixing Bottle 1L
features: BUNDLE INCLUDES: Bundle includes Carlube 2-Stroke Mineral Motorcycle Oil, CarPlan 5L Fuel Can, Unleaded Petrol (Green) + CarPlan 2-Stroke Fuel Mixing Bottle 1L
PREVENTS ENGINE DAMAGE: Helps prevent soot formation, sludge, and deposits, protecting your engine from potential damage and maintaining optimal performance.
TESTED FOR SAFETY: Each CarPlan fuel can undergoes thorough testing to ensure it meets the highest standards for strength, design, and safety compliance.
ACCURATE MIXING RATIOS: Clearly marked measurements for common 2-stroke mixes (25:1, 40:1, 50:1), ensuring your engine always gets the correct fuel-to-oil balance.
CONSISTENT LUBRICATION: Provides constant lubrication to all engine components, effectively guarding against wear and tear.
